2605.22733.title: HarnessAPI: A Skill-First Framework for Unified Streaming APIs and MCP Tools
2605.22733.paper_summary: Every Python function deployed as an LLM tool must today exist in two forms: an HTTP endpoint for human-facing clients and CI pipelines, and an MCP tool registration for agent runtimes such as Claude and Cursor. These representations share business logic yet diverge in all the surrounding machinery (routing, validation, serialisation, streaming, and schema maintenance), and they drift apart as the underlying code evolves. We present HarnessAPI, a Python framework that eliminates this duplication by treating a typed skill folder as the single source of truth. From one handler.py plus Pydantic schemas, the framework automatically derives a streaming HTTP endpoint with Server-Sent Events, an interactive OpenAPI/Swagger UI, and a zero-configuration MCP tool, all served from a single process. Dual-mode content negotiation lets the same handler serve SSE-streaming and JSON-returning clients with no handler changes. A dynamic code-generation mechanism ensures Pydantic type annotations propagate correctly to FastMCP's inspection layer, resolving a technical limitation that prevents naive closure-based registration. Measured across six representative skills using cloc, HarnessAPI reduces framework-facing boilerplate by 74% compared with a manually maintained dual-stack implementation (FastAPI server + FastMCP server). HarnessAPI subclasses FastAPI, inheriting its full middleware, dependency-injection, and deployment ecosystem. It is available at https://github.com/edwinjosechittilappilly/harnessapi and on PyPI (pip install harnessapi)
2605.22733.paper_summary_zh: 每個作為 LLM 工具部署的 Python 函數今天必須以兩種形式存在：一個供人類客戶端和 CI 管道使用的 HTTP 端點，以及一個供 Claude 和 Cursor 等代理運行時使用的 MCP 工具註冊。這些表示共享業務邏輯，但在所有周邊機制（路由、驗證、序列化、流式傳輸和架構維護）上有所不同，隨著底層代碼的演變而逐漸分離。我們提出了 HarnessAPI，一個 Python 框架，通過將類型化技能文件夾視為唯一的真相來源來消除這種重複。從一個 handler.py 加上 Pydantic 架構，該框架自動推導出一個帶有伺服器推送事件的流式 HTTP 端點、一個互動式的 OpenAPI/Swagger UI，以及一個零配置的 MCP 工具，所有這些都由單一進程提供服務。雙模式內容協商允許相同的處理器為 SSE 流式和 JSON 返回的客戶端提供服務，而無需更改處理器。動態代碼生成機制確保 Pydantic 類型註解正確地傳播到 FastMCP 的檢查層，解決了一個技術限制，該限制阻止了基於閉包的天真註冊。通過使用 cloc 對六個代表性技能進行測量，HarnessAPI 與手動維護的雙棧實現（FastAPI 伺服器 + FastMCP 伺服器）相比，減少了 74% 的框架面向的樣板代碼。HarnessAPI 是 FastAPI 的子類，繼承了其完整的中介軟體、依賴注入和部署生態系統。它可以在 https://github.com/edwinjosechittilappilly/harnessapi 和 PyPI（pip install harnessapi）上獲得。
2605.22733.author: Edwin Jose et.al.
